checks.name: bootstrap-appdata-wrapper-detection
checks.detail: Bootstrap now detects Codex wrappers under standard Windows user npm bin locations such as %APPDATA%\\npm even when npm prefix probing is unavailable.

checks.name: installer-warning-level-outcome
checks.detail: Installer runtime coverage confirms that setup, doctor, and verify stay at warning level with the real bootstrap checks when Codex is reachable only through the APPDATA shim path.

checks.name: diagnostic-precision
checks.detail: PATH follow-up messages and plan steps now include the recovered wrapper directory, while truly missing wrapper cases still keep the missing-or-partial-install guidance.

checks.name: verification-commands
checks.detail: Bootstrap tests, workspace build, typecheck, lint, and bundle validation all passed after the fix.
